info.name: HyperGarage API
info.description: API Testing Collection สำหรับระบบ HyperGarage E-Commerce

exec: pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response must be in JSON format', function() { pm.response.to.be.json; });
pm.test('Response should be an array', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });

pm.test('Each product should have required fields', function() { const d = pm.response.json(); if(d.length>0){ pm.expect(d[0]).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(d[0]).to.have.property('name'); pm.expect(d[0]).to.have.property('price'); pm.collectionVariables.set('productId', d[0].id); }});
pm.test('Response time < 2000ms', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response must be JSON', function() { pm.response.to.be.json; });
pm.test('Response time < 2000ms', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response should be an array', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });

body.raw: {"customer":"ทดสอบ ระบบ","phone":"0899999999","shippingAddress":"123 ถนนทดสอบ กรุงเทพฯ 10100","paymentMethod":"cod","items":[{"productId":"{{productId}}","quantity":1}]}

exec: pm.test('Status code should be 201', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Order has orderNumber with HG', function() { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('orderNumber'); pm.expect(d.orderNumber).to.include('HG'); });
pm.test('Order status is pending', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json().status).to.equal('pending'); });
pm.test('Response time < 2000ms', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Should return array', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });

body.raw: {"productId":"{{productId}}","userName":"สมชาย ทดสอบ","rating":5,"comment":"สินค้าคุณภาพดี ใส่แล้วเครื่องแรงขึ้นมาก"}

exec: pm.test('Status code should be 201', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Rating is 5', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json().rating).to.equal(5); });
pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Has revenue', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.property('revenue'); });
pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Store name is HyperGarage', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json().storeName).to.equal('HyperGarage'); });
pm.test('Status code should be 200', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('ok is true', function() { pm.expect(pm.response.json().ok).to.be.true; });
